title: Default VS Code extension to bundled LSP server

source.subject: lsp: default to bundled server and gate cargo launch behind devMode

body:
Defaults the VS Code extension to the **bundled LSP** binary; cargo-based launch remains behind `devMode`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`57fa823`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/57fa823)
- **Subject:** lsp: default to bundled server and gate cargo launch behind devMode
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`

## Relation
Editor UX baseline before Open VSX publish.
